title: .50AE: Create
description: Small Modpack designed for our Community Server
body:
# This Modpack is made for our Discord Server, but feel free to Play / Modify it as wanted
This Modpack is based around the Create Mod and features multiple Addons for it. This is meant to be a Vanilla+ Modpack, and due to that, there are no other "Tech" Mods apart from Create.

**Notable Mods:**
- Just Enough Items (JEI)
- Journey Map
- Jade
- Farmers Delight
- Create
- Create The Factory must Grow
- Create Steam 'n' Rails
- Create Train Additions
- Create Railways Navigator
- Create Enchantment Industry
- Create Deco
- Create Stuff & Additions
- Create Dreams & Desires
- Create Molten Metals
- Create Big Cannons
- Clockwork
- Valkyrien Skies
- Macaw's Mods
- Biomes o' Plenty
- Rechiseled
- Simple Voice Chat
- Traveler's Backpack
and More
